title: Downstream Investment Compliance India | Virtual Auditor | Virtual Auditor
description: Downstream investment structuring and compliance under FEMA. Multi-layer FDI structures, indirect foreign investment, pricing, reporting.
bodyText:
HEADING1:Downstream Investment Compliance India | Virtual Auditor

What is Downstream Investment Compliance India | Virtual Auditor | Virtual Auditor?

Downstream investment structuring and compliance under FEMA. Multi-layer FDI structures, indirect foreign investment, pricing, reporting.
Virtual Auditor provides professional downstream investment compliance india | virtual auditor services across Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. Our team of qualified Chartered Accountants (FCA), Company Secretaries (ACS), Certified Fraud Examiners (CFE), and IBBI Registered Valuers ensures compliance and accuracy.
HEADING2:Why Choose Virtual Auditor?
• Fellow Chartered Accountant (FCA) with 14+ years experience
• IBBI Registered Valuer (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333)
• Certified Fraud Examiner (CFE)
• Associate Company Secretary (ACS)
• Offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai
• 100+ complex valuations completed
HEADING2:Our Approach
We combine deep regulatory expertise with AI-powered tools to deliver accurate, defensible, and timely results. Every engagement is led by CA V. Viswanathan, ensuring senior-level attention.
HEADING2:Offices

Our downstream investment compliance practice covers FEMA regulations governing investments by Indian entities that have received foreign investment. Key aspects include: identification of downstream investment obligations under FEMA (Non-Debt Instruments) Rules, 2019, indirect foreign investment calculation, sectoral cap compliance verification, pricing guidelines adherence, reporting to RBI through authorized dealer banks (Form DI), and annual compliance monitoring. Non-compliance can result in compounding penalties. We serve multinational groups and Indian companies with foreign shareholding.
Why Choose Virtual Auditor?

Virtual Auditor brings a unique combination of professional credentials (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI Registered Valuer) and technology-driven service delivery. Our digital-first approach enables efficient engagement management with real-time status tracking for clients. We maintain strict confidentiality through secure document handling protocols and encrypted communication channels. Our team provides responsive support with dedicated relationship managers for each engagement. With offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai, and a pan-India service capability through our digital infrastructure, we serve clients ranging from startups to listed corporations. Contact us for a free initial consultation to discuss your specific requirements and receive a customized service proposal.
